caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold watch on his wrist sits in a studio setting. He is equipped with over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE." Above him, a sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'" alongside a logo containing the word "BOSS." A black table in front of him holds a black mug with red and white text that says "THE TALK OUT" and a small black electronic device. Across the sequence, the man remains seated in a similar posture, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while appearing to engage in a conversation. The scene remains static with no changes in location, clothing, or equipment.
